where.if: AND ( UPPER(HOR.HOSPITAL_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(HOR.APPLICANT_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(M.NICKNAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(M.LOGIN_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR HOR.BUSINESS_NUMBER LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST HOR JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON HOR.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID

SELECT HOR.REQUEST_ID AS requestId, HOR.Member_id AS memberId, HOR.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, HOR.BUSINESS_NUMBER AS businessNumber, HOR.DOCUMENT_Url AS documentUrl, HOR.STATUS AS status, HOR.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, HOR.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, HOR.PROCESSED_AT AS processedAt, M.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, HOR.HOSPITAL_NAME AS hospitalName FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST HOR JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON HOR.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID
ORDER BY
M.NICKNAME
HOR.HOSPITAL_NAME
CASE HOR.STATUS WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 1 WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN 2 WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
HOR.REJECT_REASON
HOR.CREATED_AT
HOR.PROCESSED_AT
HOR.REQUEST_ID
ASC
DESC
NULLS LAST
, HOR.REQUEST_ID DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT HOR.REQUEST_ID AS requestId, HOR.Member_id AS memberId, HOR.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, HOR.BUSINESS_NUMBER AS businessNumber, HOR.DOCUMENT_Url AS documentUrl, HOR.STATUS AS status, HOR.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, HOR.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, HOR.PROCESSED_AT AS processedAt, HOR.PROCESSED_BY AS processedBy, HOR.APPLICANT_NAME AS applicantName, HOR.HOSPITAL_NAME AS hospitalName, HOR.HOSPITAL_PHONE AS hospitalPhone, HOR.HOSPITAL_ADDRESS AS hospitalAddress, HOR.HOSPITAL_DETAIL_ADDRESS AS hospitalDetailAddress, HOR.HOSPITAL_DISTRICT AS hospitalDistrict, HOR.HOSPITAL_WEBSITE_URL AS hospitalWebsiteUrl, HOR.HOSPITAL_LATITUDE AS hospitalLatitude, HOR.HOSPITAL_LONGITUDE AS hospitalLongitude, HOR.HOSPITAL_OPEN_TIME AS hospitalOpenTime, HOR.HOSPITAL_CLOSE_TIME AS hospitalCloseTime, HOR.HOSPITAL_BREAK_TIME AS hospitalBreakTime, HOR.HOSPITAL_CLOSED_DAYS AS hospitalClosedDays, HOR.HOSPITAL_DOCTOR_INFO AS hospitalDoctorInfo, HOR.HOSPITAL_DESCRIPTION AS hospitalDescription, HOR.HOSPITAL_IMAGE_URL AS hospitalImageUrl, HOR.HOSPITAL_NOTE AS hospitalNote, M.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, M.NICKNAME AS nickname FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST HOR JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON HOR.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE HOR.REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}
SELECT AT.ANIMAL_NAME FROM OWNER_REQUEST_ANIMAL ORA JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE AT ON ORA.ANIMAL_ID = AT.ANIMAL_ID WHERE ORA.REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} ORDER BY AT.ANIMAL_ID
SELECT MS.SERVICE_NAME FROM OWNER_REQUEST_SERVICE ORS JOIN MEDICAL_SERVICE MS ON ORS.SERVICE_ID = MS.SERVICE_ID WHERE ORS.REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} ORDER BY MS.SERVICE_ID
SELECT MS.SUBJECT_NAME FROM OWNER_REQUEST_MEDICAL_SUBJECT ORMS JOIN MEDICAL_SUBJECT MS ON ORMS.SUBJECT_ID = MS.SUBJECT_ID WHERE ORMS.REQUEST_ID = #{requestId} ORDER BY MS.SUBJECT_ID
